message:
✨ Console UI improvements + 3D globe animation (#6)

* ✨ Add interactive 3D globe animation to login page

- Port NetworkGlobe animation from kubestellar.io website
- Add Three.js dependencies (@react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei, three)
- Create globe components: NetworkGlobe, Cluster, DataPacket, LogoElement, GlobeLoader
- Update Login.tsx with two-column layout: form on left, animated globe on right
- Globe shows KubeStellar clusters with animated data flows between them

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix three.js versions for React 18 compatibility

- Downgrade @react-three/fiber to 8.17.10 (React 18 compatible)
- Downgrade @react-three/drei to 9.120.4 (React 18 compatible)
- Downgrade three to 0.169.0 (compatible with older react-three)
- Add react-is dependency for recharts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
